passage: The new test had 95% sensitivity (Lopez, 2022).
source_excerpt: Diagnostic sensitivity was 95% (95% CI 92-97) in the validation cohort.

passage: Mean follow-up was 12 months (Iverson, 2021).
source_excerpt: Participants were followed for a mean of 12 months after enrollment.

passage: Treatment reduced symptoms compared with placebo (Yamada, 2020).
source_excerpt: Symptom scores decreased significantly in the treatment arm versus placebo (p<0.001).

passage: Adverse events were similar between groups (Kobayashi, 2023).
source_excerpt: Rates of adverse events did not differ between intervention and control groups.

passage: The model achieved an AUC of 0.87 (Singh, 2024).
source_excerpt: Our model reached an AUC of 0.87 on the held-out test set.

passage: Around 30% of patients reported nausea (Garcia, 2019).
source_excerpt: Nausea was reported by approximately 30% of patients during the first cycle.

passage: The cohort included 1200 adults aged 40-65 (Berger, 2022).
source_excerpt: We enrolled 1200 adults aged 40 to 65 from three centers.

passage: Survival improved with adjuvant therapy (Wang, 2021).
source_excerpt: Adjuvant therapy was associated with improved overall survival.

passage: Both biomarker A and biomarker B were elevated (Petrov, 2023).
source_excerpt: Levels of biomarker A and biomarker B were significantly elevated in cases versus controls.

passage: Compliance with the protocol was high (Davies, 2018).
source_excerpt: Protocol compliance was high across all study sites.

passage: Mortality halved with the intervention (Khan, 2022).
source_excerpt: Mortality decreased by 12% in the intervention group compared with controls.

passage: The vaccine showed 99% efficacy in children (Owens, 2023).
source_excerpt: Efficacy in pediatric participants was 78% (95% CI 70-84).

passage: There was no association between diet and outcome (Mehta, 2020).
source_excerpt: A statistically significant association was observed between dietary pattern and the primary outcome.

passage: The drug was approved by the FDA in 2018 (Rivera, 2024).
source_excerpt: Regulatory approval was granted by the FDA in 2021.

passage: Average BMI in the cohort was 32 (Hassan, 2021).
source_excerpt: The cohort had a mean BMI of 26.4.

passage: Cognitive scores improved over the course of follow-up (Becker, 2019).
source_excerpt: Cognitive scores declined over the course of follow-up in both groups.

passage: Hospital length of stay was longer with the new protocol (Tanaka, 2022).
source_excerpt: Length of stay was approximately one day shorter in the new protocol arm.

passage: The trial enrolled exclusively female participants (Marin, 2020).
source_excerpt: Participants included 540 men and 460 women.

passage: Adverse events were higher in the placebo arm (Costa, 2023).
source_excerpt: Adverse events were more common in the active treatment arm than placebo.

passage: Air pollution increases asthma hospitalizations (Roberts, 2021).
source_excerpt: Methods: We surveyed 3000 households about heating fuel use.

passage: Magnesium intake reduces migraine frequency (Olsen, 2022).
source_excerpt: Table 2 lists serum potassium values across age groups.

passage: Coral bleaching events have intensified (Nakamura, 2023).
source_excerpt: We discuss kelp forest decline along the temperate Pacific coast.

passage: Children exposed to lead show lower IQ scores (Watson, 2020).
source_excerpt: Figure 1 shows iron levels measured in soil samples by district.

passage: Continuous glucose monitoring improves HbA1c (Park, 2024).
source_excerpt: We compared two questionnaire instruments for measuring sleep quality.

passage: Microplastic concentrations are rising in rivers (Gomez, 2022).
source_excerpt: This editorial discusses peer review reform in environmental journals.

passage: Maternal smoking is linked to low birth weight (Hayes, 2018).
source_excerpt: We describe a new MRI sequence for cardiac imaging in adults.

passage: Sleep deprivation impairs memory consolidation (Friedman, 2023).
source_excerpt: Background: Workplace ergonomics has been studied extensively in office settings.

passage: Statin therapy reduces stroke incidence (Quinn, 2021).
source_excerpt: Supplementary methods: Antibody dilution protocols are summarized in Appendix A.

passage: Yoga may reduce chronic low back pain (Ali, 2022).
source_excerpt: Future studies should examine whether yoga interventions yield clinically meaningful pain relief.

passage: Probiotics support gut microbiome diversity (Volkov, 2020).
source_excerpt: We hypothesize that probiotic supplementation could influence microbiome composition; further trials are needed.

passage: Mindfulness training reduces clinician burnout (Brennan, 2023).
source_excerpt: Mindfulness programs have been proposed as a possible strategy for clinician wellbeing.

passage: Dietary fiber lowers colorectal cancer risk (Sato, 2019).
source_excerpt: An association between fiber intake and colorectal outcomes has been suggested in observational reports, but causality remains unclear.

passage: Telehealth reduces no-show rates (Cohen, 2024).
source_excerpt: There is preliminary evidence that telehealth could affect appointment adherence.

passage: Green tea consumption lowers blood pressure (Lin, 2018).
source_excerpt: Some small studies hint at modest cardiovascular effects of green tea, but findings are mixed.

passage: Wearable devices accurately detect atrial fibrillation (Patel, 2024).
source_excerpt: Discussion: Larger validation cohorts are needed before clinical conclusions can be drawn.

passage: Air filtration improves classroom test scores (Becerra, 2022).
source_excerpt: This commentary outlines policy options without presenting primary results.

passage: AI-based triage reduces emergency wait times (Schultz, 2023).
source_excerpt: We describe study design and protocol; outcomes will be reported in a future manuscript.

passage: School breakfast programs improve attendance (Adeyemi, 2020).
source_excerpt: Methods only; results section is forthcoming.

passage: Smart pill bottles increase medication adherence (Reed, 2021).
source_excerpt: This is a study protocol; outcome data are not yet available.

passage: The intervention reduced HbA1c by 1.2% and was well tolerated (Nasser, 2023).
source_excerpt: HbA1c decreased by 1.2% in the intervention arm. Adverse events were comparable between groups.

passage: Treatment improved sleep and reduced anxiety in adolescents (Ho, 2022).
source_excerpt: Sleep duration increased after treatment; anxiety scores were unchanged.

passage: The study reported a 50% drop in mortality and a 30% drop in readmission (Vance, 2024).
source_excerpt: Mortality fell by 18% in the treatment arm; readmission rates were not analyzed in this report.

passage: Both groups had similar pain scores and identical hospital costs (Park, 2020).
source_excerpt: Pain scores were similar between groups. Cost analyses were beyond the scope of this report.

passage: Approximately 1 in 5 participants had the condition; risk factors were unclear (Iyer, 2021).
source_excerpt: Prevalence was 20% in the cohort. Risk factor modeling was reported.

passage: The intervention worked equally well in adults and children (Daniels, 2024).
source_excerpt: Efficacy was demonstrated in adults; pediatric data were not collected.
